summary: Turkish firm Skydagger has begun serial production of the HUNTER drone interceptor, capable of 320 km/h with day/thermal imaging and radar-guided targeting. Ukrainian forces from the 66th Mechanized Brigade and 35th Marine Brigade conducted successful FPV drone operations, including evacuating a wounded soldier and destroying Russian personnel and equipment. Russian TOS-1A MLRS was first damaged by a Bulava loitering munition and then finished off by FPV drones, while other FPV strikes targeted motorcycle-borne assaults and a soldier feigning surrender. Ukrainian EW interference was humorously depicted in a meme, and Russian forces claimed 234 targets destroyed in a single day across multiple directions, including Ukrainian UAVs and personnel.
